FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Services PMI Exceeds Expectations

US equities at fresh record high reinforces risk-on sentiment favorable to USD/JPY upside

FX.excerpt: Services PMI beat fuels USD strength; MA20 support intact; buy the dip setup activated.
FX.comment: Services PMI beat and equity highs support bullish bias; buy on MA20 dips
